title: lathyrus sylvestris subsp. pyrenaicus
intro: Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. pyrenaicus, also known as the Pyrenean woodpea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. pyrenaicus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its rich nutrient profile and bioactive compounds.
